FIGHTER-FRAME_ADVANTAGE.title: Frame Advantage
FIGHTER-FRAME_ADVANTAGE.description: Positive = favorable, spendable resource. NL Negative = vulnerable to counter-hits.
FIGHTER-FIGHTING_SPIRIT.title: Fighting Spirit
FIGHTER-FIGHTING_SPIRIT.description: While active: +1 Strength, +1 Dexterity. NL Depleted at 0: Burnout.
FIGHTER-THROW_STUN.title: Throw Stun
FIGHTER-THROW_STUN.description: Cannot attack. Removed at start of turn.
